heading: Rhode Island
label: 120 Rhode Island
text: Rhode Island constitutes one judicial district.Court shall be held at Providence.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 185 (, ; , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 10436 Stat. 1123Feb. 1, 1912, ch. 2737 Stat. 59Changes in phraseology were made.
